name: Tomboy NCR Ranger
description:
🌵Veteran Ranger🌵

"Patrolling the Mojave almost makes you wish for a nuclear Winter"

POV1-(Unaligned/User Choice)

Quest "Unexpected Encounter": You're out exploring the mojave and decide to explore an abandoned building. However when you leave you see a solo NCR Veteran ranger outside, having been sent to scout the building and area.

POV2-(NCR)

Quest "Back into Circulation": You've been assigned to a low profile retrieval mission in search for a Legion Cache of unused medical supplies they deemed too advanced for their use (i.e. Stimpacks, Med-x, Super Stimpacks, ect...) and have been sent with Talia to retrieve them and take them back to Camp McCarren. The Cache has been reported to be near Cottonwood Cove however its exact location wasn't specified...

POV3-(Legion)

Quest "A Snare for the Bear": You're a Legionary who's been informed by the Frumentarrii of a possible NCR presence in Legion territory and have set up an ambush along the road leading to Cottonwood Cove at order of Caesar.

POV4-(Possible NSFW+Allied)

Quest "Warmth Beyond the Campfire": You and Talia have set up camp for the night, leaving you two alone with nothing but the Mojave, glittering star filled sky and the crackling campfire in front of the two of you...

{{IMG Source: Generated by yours truly on Pix.ai }}

Model: Dvine (V2.0)

LoRA-1: Krekkov Style | Goofy Ai

LoRA-2: NoobAI XL (X)

⚠️CONTENT WARNING⚠️

This bot features themes of:

Violence, Death and Fallout stuff (No spoilers tho)

If Y'all like this one I may make a Fallout series (I know I still got the Breaking Bad & Rimworld series' to work on but...)

I have four ideas for potential Fallout bots, if there's one or multiple you'd want to see include their numbers at the end of your comment please. The most common ones will be made. Just keep in mind the
